title: Strategy Analyst
description: BCG is seeking a Strategy Analyst to support client engagements in operations, corporate strategy, and digital transformation. You will conduct business analysis, develop strategic recommendations, and collaborate with experienced consultants on projects serving Fortune 500 companies and public sector clients.
responsibilities: Conduct market research and competitive analysis to inform strategy
Build financial models and performance dashboards
Interview stakeholders and synthesize findings into actionable insights
Develop presentation materials for client leadership
Support project management and coordinate workstream activities
Identify and develop new business opportunities

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Business, Economics, Engineering, or related field

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, vision, and life insurance
Professional development and MBA sponsorship opportunities
Flexible work arrangements and travel flexibility
